creator: hvo.pm@xs4all.nl
text:
Running "pkg check -Bsd" you get:

[ ... ]
gstreamer1-plugins-gdkpixbuf has require a missing libraries: libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so.0
gtk-engines2 has require a missing libraries: libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so.0
gtk-update-icon-cache has require a missing libraries: libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so.0
gtk2 has require a missing libraries: libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so.0
gtk3 has require a missing libraries: libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so.0
[ ... ]

The lib is there, but not in the pkg database.
